game_info.title: Neon Snake Breaker
game_info.concept:
Swipe your finger to guide a snake of balls and break the bricks.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/snake-vs-block/id1233739175

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Swipe your finger to guide a snake of balls and break the bricks.
Try to break as many bricks as possible.
Get additional balls and make the biggest snake ever!

Very easy to play but very hard to reach high scores!

Game Features:
- Free to play
- Endless gameplay
- Simple swipe control
- Challenge your friends with the best highscore
game_info.description:
Welcome to Neon Snake Breaker! You control a snake composed of balls moving through a scrolling neon corridor.
Your goal is to travel as far as possible by breaking through numbered blocks that block your path.
Breaking a block costs you snake balls equal to the number on the block.
Collect scattered numbered balls to grow your snake and extend your life.
Navigate through walls, choose the path of least resistance (lowest numbers), and manage your length wisely!
Build up your Fever Meter by breaking blocks to unleash a temporary invincible dash.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Steer the snake horizontally.
- Shift (Hold): Move horizontally faster (Precision control).
- Z: Activate Fever Mode (Invincibility) when the meter is full.
- ENTER: Start the game from the main menu.
- ESC: Pause or Unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game when on the Game Over screen.

TEST_1.test_description: Test the "Smart Survival" heuristic AI. The goal is to verify that the game state updates correctly and the player can survive for a reasonable duration by choosing optimal paths.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI scans entities ahead of the player. It prioritizes collecting food (positive value) and avoiding high-value blocks (negative impact). It steers towards the "lowest cost" path in a look-ahead window.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive longer than a random agent, collecting balls and breaking only necessary low-value blocks. The score should increase consistently until an unavoidable high-value wall appears.

TEST_2.test_description: Test collision boundaries and "Game Over" state triggers. The goal is to ensure the game correctly transitions to Game Over when the snake length hits zero.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will intentionally steer towards the highest value blocks available to deplete the snake's length as quickly as possible.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The snake length should decrease rapidly upon contact with large blocks. The game phase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" promptly when length reaches 0.

TEST_3.test_description: Test Fever Mode mechanics and input handling.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI will play normally until the Fever meter is full (monitored via gameState), then immediately trigger the 'Z' key input to activate Fever.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Fever mode should activate, granting invincibility (no length loss on blocks) and increased speed for the duration. The meter should deplete and return to normal gameplay.
